text: If there hadn ' t been so many hiccups with the videos and quizzes I would recommend this course . However , I lost a great deal of time viewing incomplete videos and trying to complete quizzes covering material that was not addressed or only partially addressed in the videos . Then had to go back and Review all the videos once they had been re - uploaded . It was a very frustrating experience . I lost momentum and even motivation and as a result am now behind with the assignments and quizzes .
